name: Very low income - below MPF minimum (HK$60,000)
description: Monthly income HK$5,000 is below HK$7,100 MPF minimum, so employee MPF contribution is zero. Also below basic allowance, so zero tax.

sources.description: Manual calculation: Monthly income HK$5,000 < HK$7,100 minimum, so employee MPF = 0. Net income = 60000. NCI = 60000 - 132000 = 0 (negative, clamped). Tax = 0.
